
### branch target buffer 


* what if we can't decode LABEL from machine code for <code>jmp LABEL</code> or <code>jle LABEL</code> fast?
* what if we can't decode that there's a RET, CALL, etc. fast?
* both issues for deeper pipelines 

   * want to fetch instruction X before decoding instruction X-1



### BTB: cache for branch targets 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/bpred/texfig/btbStructure.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/btbStructure.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/btbStructure.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::
